title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Nvidia's PiD (Pixel Diffusion) is an open-source AI model designed for generating high-quality 4K images. It is integrated with ComfyUI and can be paired with text encoders like Gemma 2b for text-to-image generation workflows.
